title: cephaelis bicoloriceps
intro: Cephaelis bicoloriceps is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae, commonly known as the Bicolor-headed Warcup or Yellow Warcup. It is a medicinal plant that has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and gastrointestinal issues. In herbal preparations, the leaves of Cephaelis bicoloriceps can be used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are believed to provide relief from various health conditions.
